---
title: "Health Financing Real-Time Dashboard"
subtitle: "Operational monitoring for service continuity"
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    code-fold: false
    code-copy: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="padding:4.5rem 0 2.25rem;">
  <span class="section-eyebrow">Project E · Interactive Dashboard</span>
  <h1 class="section-h" style="font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.2rem);margin-top:0.45rem;">Real-time health financing dashboard.</h1>
  <p class="section-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">A Shiny-style monitoring concept that combines KPI tracking, facility comparison, and early warning signals for stockout or reimbursement risk.</p>
</div>
```

## What the dashboard monitors

- reimbursement lag by facility
- medicine stockout exposure
- household payment burden
- facility-level risk flags for intervention prioritization

```{=html}
<div class="services-grid" style="margin-top:1.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📍</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Facility drill-down</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Move from county view to facility detail to inspect reimbursement lag, stock status, and high-risk alerts.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📦</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Stockout forecasting</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Estimate near-term medicine stockout risk using historical lag and current consumption signals.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📊</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Executive KPI strip</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Show the handful of metrics decision-makers actually need each week rather than overwhelming them with charts.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🚨</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Alerting logic</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Escalate facilities that cross thresholds for payment delays, stock risk, or continuity-of-care danger.</p>
  </article>
</div>
```

## Project files

- [app.R](./app.R) for the Shiny dashboard shell
- [data_prep.R](./data_prep.R) for synthetic KPI preparation
- [data/facility_kpis.csv](./data/facility_kpis.csv) as the demo data source
- [README.md](./README.md) explaining the dashboard concept

## Why it matters

This project shows product thinking, not just analysis. The point is not to create another static report. It is to show how operational data, simple forecasting, and drill-down design can support faster decisions.

[Back to Projects →](../../index.qmd){.btn-solid style="margin-top:2rem;display:inline-block;"}
